E.name: Result
E.description:
Possible values:

* `0` - NotAuthenticated
* `1` - NotAuthorized
* `2` - Authenticated
* `3` - NeedsTwoFactorAuthentication
* `4` - NeedsOrganizationUnitID
* `5` - NeedsEmailVerification
* `6` - NeedsPasswordReset
* `7` - NeedsVisibilityGroupID
* `8` - NeedsChallenge
* `9` - NeedsTwoFactorSetup

N.name: ID
N.description: This is the ID of a `OrganizationUnit`

N.name: Type
N.description:
Flags enum, combine any of the below values:

* `0` - None
* `1` - Shop
* `2` - WebShop
* `4` - Container
* `8` - Pickup
* `16` - Warehouse
* `36` - Country
* `64` - Franchise
* `128` - EVA
* `256` - TestOrganizationUnit
* `512` - DisableLogin
* `1024` - Supplier
* `1024` - ExternalSupplier
* `3072` - Consignment
* `4096` - B2b
* `8196` - Region
* `16384` - ReturnsPortal
* `32768` - Restitution
* `65536` - RepairCenter
* `131072` - Mobile
* `262144` - ConcessionStore
* `524288` - Virtual

* `8` - Business
* `17` - System
* `64` - Debtor
* `512` - Tester
* `1024` - RemovedByRequest
* `2048` - Api
